NATO Integrated Air and Missile Defence (IAMD) Funding Contribution

capital_investment_and_nuclear.name: Capital Investment, Nuclear Deterrent & Munitions Production

personnel_and_training.name: Service Personnel Pay, Pensions and Professional Training

2026.methodology: Forecast based on the 'Spending Review 2025' and Budget 2025. Original values in GBP converted to USD at the March 2026 projected rate of 1.32. Total Income reflects the Treasury-settled Main Estimate. Spending categories extrapolated using the 7.3% real-terms growth target for investment/capital projects as specified in the strategic roadmap to 2.6% GDP by 2027. Personnel costs adjusted based on the 2025 AFPRB baseline.

sources: HM Treasury DEL Funding (Main & Supplementary Estimates)
Special Reserve for Military Operations (including Ukraine Support)

equipment_and_nuclear.name: Equipment Procurement, Support and Nuclear Enterprise

personnel_costs.name: Military and Civilian Pay and Pensions

2025.methodology: Figures represent 'Core Military Spending' from the UK Budget 2025, converted from GBP to USD (rate 1.32). Total Income corresponds to the Departmental Expenditure Limit (DEL) excluding ring-fenced depreciation. Spending reflects the 2025-26 fiscal cycle allocation for NATO readiness requirements. Calculations exclude AME to isolate controllable operational spending.

2024.methodology: Data extracted from the MOD Annual Report and Accounts 2023-24. Original GBP figures converted to USD at the projected 2026 rate of 1.32 for consistency. Income is the Net Cash Requirement (NCR) granted by Parliament. Spending is Resource DEL + Capital DEL minus Depreciation, excluding AME.
